lines.hearsay: Somebody at {place} was in no hurry at all over a notice.
lines.gossip: {A} read the board through twice at {place} and left every notice where it hung, which is what {A} does, and which {A} will explain to you at length if you make the mistake of asking.
lines.report: {A} reviewed the notices at {place}; no claim entered, slot {slot}.
